# blatent 0.1.3

* Regenerated `src/RcppExports.cpp` (and related auto-generated files) with
  Rcpp 1.1.1 so that internal `Rf_error()` calls are emitted in the guarded
  `(Rf_error)(...)` form, per the Rcpp/CRAN maintainer request. No
  user-visible behavior change.
* Bumped minimum Rcpp version to `>= 1.1.1` in `Imports`.
